g.title: Arcane::MeshMatrixMDVariableRefT< ItemType, DataType_, Row, Column, Extents >

a.xlink:title: Class managing a multi-dimensional NumMatrix type variable on a mesh entity.
Base class for a variable on mesh entities.
Type information for a data container.
Internal class to manage functors called when the variable is updated.
Interface of the base class for main arcane objects.
Interface of the data factory manager.
Information characterizing the type of a variable.
Observable that automatically calls IObservable::detachAllObservers() in the destructor.
